article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his work.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent figures in the music industry. His collaborations include projects with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, among others.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack contains a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, which have been utilized in various of his productions.
His approach to production is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, resulting in a distinctive sound that has earned him recognition within the electronic music scene.

Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his association with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, who share a common ground in electronic and dance music production.
